archive_summary.title: Project Costs

included_content.item: budget summary and per-task cost breakdown

section.title: Project Costs (Full Detail)
section.content:
Total budget: $2000.00 Total spent: $2.50 Budget remaining: $1997.50 Spent: 0.1%
### Cost Breakdown by Category
* claude-code-orchestration: $2.50
### Cost Breakdown by Service
* anthropic_api: $2.50
### Per-Task Costs
* t0002_baseline_evaluation: $2.50 * t0003_literature_review_entity_stt: $0.00 * t0004_vocabulary_biasing_experiment: $0.00 * t0005_stt_model_survey_brainpowa: $0.00
